symptom: Model accuracy dropped significantly after deployment
root_cause: Data distribution shift between training and production
resolution: Retrain model with updated production data and monitor feature distributions

symptom: Training process crashes with CUDA out of memory error
root_cause: Batch size too large for available GPU memory
resolution: Reduce batch size or use gradient accumulation

symptom: Model outputs NaN loss during training
root_cause: Exploding gradients or invalid input values
resolution: Apply gradient clipping and validate input data

symptom: Inference API latency increased suddenly
resolution: Enable autoscaling and optimize inference pipeline

symptom: Model predictions biased toward a single class
resolution: Use class weighting or resample dataset

symptom: Out of memory (OOM) error during data preprocessing
root_cause: Large dataset loaded entirely into memory
resolution: Use batch processing or streaming data pipelines

symptom: Model performs well offline but poorly in production
root_cause: Training-serving skew due to inconsistent preprocessing
resolution: Ensure identical preprocessing in training and inference pipelines

symptom: Gradual decline in model performance over time
resolution: Implement periodic retraining and monitoring

symptom: Prediction service returns intermittent errors
resolution: Add retry logic and input validation

symptom: Feature importance drastically changes after retraining
resolution: Audit and standardize feature pipeline

symptom: Model training is extremely slow
root_cause: Inefficient data loading or lack of parallelism
resolution: Optimize data loader and use multiprocessing

symptom: Model fails on edge cases in production
root_cause: Insufficient representation of edge cases in training data
resolution: Augment dataset with edge case examples

symptom: Predictions contain unexpected null values
resolution: Implement input validation and imputation strategies

symptom: API throughput drops under heavy load
resolution: Enable parallel processing or batching

symptom: Model overfits training data
root_cause: Model too complex or insufficient regularization
resolution: Apply regularization techniques and cross-validation

symptom: GPU utilization remains low during training
resolution: Optimize data pipeline and use prefetching

symptom: Deployment fails due to missing dependencies
resolution: Use containerization or environment management tools

symptom: Model predictions are inconsistent across runs
resolution: Set random seeds for reproducibility

symptom: Inference results differ from validation results
root_cause: Mismatch in preprocessing or feature scaling
resolution: Align preprocessing steps across environments

symptom: Model crashes when handling large inputs
resolution: Implement input truncation or batching
